query:
SELECT pb.id as batch_id, pb.period_start, pb.period_end, pb.group_id, pb.total_amount, pb.status,
       pbi.worker_id, w.code as worker_code, w.name as worker_name, 
       pbi.days_worked, pbi.base_amount, pbi.deductions, pbi.bonuses, pbi.net_amount
FROM payroll_batches pb
JOIN payroll_batch_items pbi ON pb.id = pbi.batch_id
JOIN workers w ON pbi.worker_id = w.id
WHERE pb.period_start = '2026-02-02'
ORDER BY w.code;
